## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cd web && npx svelte-check` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No new `unwrap()` in library code
- [ ] Screenshots attached (if UI change)
- [ ] Tested with live RTMP source (if touching ingest/egress/switching)
- [ ] Tested cross-resolution switch (if touching program router or normalizer)
